description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle featuring a matte black finish and a modular design. It is equipped with a telescopic scope mounted on the top rail for precision aiming, and a detachable box magazine located just in front of the pistol grip. The rifle has a long, vented handguard with visible barrel and a muzzle device at the tip. The stock is fixed and robust, designed for stability and comfort during use. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a rugged and utilitarian appearance.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a scope, detachable magazine, and fixed stock, featuring a long barrel and vented handguard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, barrel, and the circular outline of the scope above the handguard.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the scope, magazine, pistol grip, and fixed stock.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock, rear of the scope, and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the rifle's profile, including the scope, magazine, and detailed handguard.
